series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains documents and forms related to the application and subsequent approval/disapproval to operate a nurse aide training program. Documentation includes, but is not limited to; the application, couse agenda/criteria, trainer qualifications, approval/disapproval letters, class schedule, trainee report, revocation and other ''enforcement'' letters and general correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Active Programs: Retain records for five years after the year in which the record was prepared. Destroy after five year period provided that no legal action is pending against the facility and all appeals have been resolved. Inactive or Closed Programs: Retain records two additional years following the year in which final action was taken with respect to denial, termination, or withdrawal. Destroy record after this two year period provided that no legal action is pending against the facility and all appeals have been resolved ; Electronic: Same retention period as paper, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
